summary: Iteration 67: Phase C Enhanced Sync Progress & Status - ALL TESTS PASSED. App loads correctly, login works, OfflineIndicator shows Online badge, 'Select a branch to enable offline mode' message displays for all-branches view, and POS page loads with all products. Code review confirms all Phase C features are properly implemented.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1x-1) - minor styling issue on initial render (known, pre-existing)

LOGOUT_WITH_PENDING_SALES_WARNING.window_confirm_dialog: PASS - Shows confirmation dialog with proper warning message
LOGOUT_WITH_PENDING_SALES_WARNING.cancel_prevents_logout: PASS - Returns early if user cancels (confirmed === false)
LOGOUT_WITH_PENDING_SALES_WARNING.logout_without_pending_sales: PASS - Proceeds normally when no pending sales

OFFLINE_DB_HAS_PENDING_SALES.returns_boolean: PASS - Returns count > 0 (true if pending sales exist)

OFFLINE_INDICATOR_PENDING_SALES_SECTION.pending_count_bold_text: PASS - Uses font-semibold class for count display
OFFLINE_INDICATOR_PENDING_SALES_SECTION.waiting_for_internet_badge: PASS - Shows 'waiting for internet' badge when !isOnline
OFFLINE_INDICATOR_PENDING_SALES_SECTION.progress_bar_during_sync: PASS - Progress component shows during sync with stepLabel containing 'sale'
OFFLINE_INDICATOR_PENDING_SALES_SECTION.syncing_step_label: PASS - Displays 'Syncing sale X/Y...' via sync_progress event
OFFLINE_INDICATOR_PENDING_SALES_SECTION.sync_now_button_when_online: PASS - 'Sync Now' button visible when isOnline && !syncing
OFFLINE_INDICATOR_PENDING_SALES_SECTION.sales_safely_stored_message: PASS - Shows 'Sales are safely stored. They will auto-sync when connection returns.' when offline

OFFLINE_INDICATOR_READY_STATE.ready_for_offline_text: PASS - Shows 'Ready for offline' in isReady state
OFFLINE_INDICATOR_READY_STATE.auto_refresh_text: PASS - Shows 'Auto-refreshes every 5 min' with RefreshCw icon

POS_PAGE_FUNCTIONALITY.page_loads: PASS - Sales page loads correctly at /sales-new
POS_PAGE_FUNCTIONALITY.products_display: PASS - Products grid shows with prices and inventory
POS_PAGE_FUNCTIONALITY.cart_display: PASS - Cart panel visible with checkout button

APP_LOADS_WITHOUT_ERRORS.dashboard: PASS - Owner Dashboard loads after login
APP_LOADS_WITHOUT_ERRORS.no_console_errors: PASS - Only pre-existing chart dimension warnings

critical_code_review_comments: Phase C correctly implements logout warning via dynamic import to check hasPendingSales()
Pending sales section properly shows count with bold font-semibold styling
Progress bar uses shadcn Progress component correctly for sync visualization
Sync Now button replaces old 'Push now' link with proper amber styling
'Sales are safely stored' reassurance message displays only when offline
'waiting for internet' badge shown only when offline with pending sales
Code handles sync events (sync_start, sync_progress, sync_complete) for step labels
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 67 verified Phase C Enhanced Sync Progress & Status features. Key implementations: (1) AuthContext logout() checks hasPendingSales() via dynamic import and shows window.confirm dialog, (2) OfflineIndicator pending sales section shows bold count, 'waiting for internet' badge when offline, progress bar during sync with step labels, 'Sync Now' button when online, and 'Sales are safely stored' reassurance when offline, (3) App loads without errors after Phase C changes. The pending sales UI only appears when pendingCount > 0 (requires offline sales in IndexedDB to test fully). Previous iteration 66 features (delta sync, org-scoped IndexedDB, 5-minute auto-refresh) remain working.
